pageContext.name: Stephen Strange Mini Co.
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the Stephen Strange Mini Co. Collectible Figure from the Mini Co. Series line.  These hand-painted Doctor Strange collectible figures were created by Iron Studios and are the perfect size for any desk or shelf no matter the size of your collection.  A must-have for fans of Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness and Marvel collectibles!
